post.title: Must-Attend AI Conferences in India (2026)

post.excerpt: Artificial Intelligence is moving at breakneck speed. Stay ahead of the curve by attending these top AI conferences in India.
post.content:
# Must-Attend AI Conferences in India (2026)

If 2023 was the year of AI hype, 2026 is the year of ubiquitous AI integration. To stay competitive, professionals across all industries must understand how to leverage these tools.

Here are the top AI conferences happening in India this year:

## Enterprise AI Summit (Mumbai)
A focused look at how Fortune 500 companies are deploying internal LLMs securely and efficiently.

## Generative AI Hackathon (Bangalore)
A 48-hour sprint to build the most innovative AI applications. Open to developers, designers, and product managers.

## AI Ethics & Policy Forum (New Delhi)
As AI becomes more powerful, governance is critical. This forum brings together policymakers and tech leaders to discuss the future of AI regulation in India.
